productName: SMC - Infused Joint Pack - Creme Brulee - 5g
description: Ready-to-spark indica infused pre-roll of Creme Brulee, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, coffee, and chestnut, with a heavy, relaxed body calm. A little goes a long way.
